ddls:
CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the major belongs to */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree offered (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the major was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the major was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary entry */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the salary data pertains to */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of graduates surveyed for the salary data */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary figures */,
  "starting_median_salary" TEXT /* Starting median salary for the major */,
  "mid_career_median_salary" TEXT /* Mid-career median salary for the major */,
  "percent_change" TEXT /* Percent change from starting to mid-career salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_percentiles" (
  "percentile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percentile entry */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the percentile data pertains to */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of graduates surveyed for the percentile data */,
  "mid_career_10th_percentile" TEXT /* Mid-career 10th percentile salary for the major */,
  "mid_career_25th_percentile" TEXT /* Mid-career 25th percentile salary for the major */,
  "mid_career_75th_percentile" TEXT /* Mid-career 75th percentile salary for the major */,
  "mid_career_90th_percentile" TEXT /* Mid-career 90th percentile salary for the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("percentile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_percentiles_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., career counselor, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major being requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, completed, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_requests_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request the report was generated for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* The actual report data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_reports_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES salary_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major being updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column being updated */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the column */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)
